description: 3D Secure authentication for card payments — required for PSD2/SCA compliance in Europe

SCA_WHEN_REQUIRED.description: Trigger 3D Secure only when required by card issuer, regulation, or risk assessment

SCA_ALWAYS.description: Always trigger 3D Secure authentication regardless of requirements
SCA_ALWAYS.use_case: When maximum fraud protection is needed, even at the cost of conversion

liability_shift.YES: Issuer accepts fraud liability — merchant protected from chargebacks
liability_shift.POSSIBLE: 3D Secure available but not fully completed
liability_shift.NO: No liability shift — merchant bears fraud risk
liability_shift.UNKNOWN: Cannot determine — treat as NO for business decisions

authentication_status.N: Authentication failed — DO NOT proceed with capture

v6_behavior.description: In v6, 3D Secure is triggered automatically by the Card Fields SDK when the card issuer requires it
flow: 1. Buyer enters card details in Card Fields
2. On submit, SDK sends card data to PayPal
4. If required: SDK presents 3D Secure challenge to buyer
6. SDK returns result to onApprove callback
7. Server captures order and checks authentication_result

v5_behavior.description: In v5, 3D Secure is also handled automatically by CardFields when SCA is required
v5_behavior.flow: Similar to v6 — CardFields.submit() triggers 3DS if needed

business_logic_recommendations.liability_shift_YES: Safe to fulfill — issuer bears chargeback liability
business_logic_recommendations.liability_shift_NO: Consider additional verification for high-value orders

regional_requirements.Europe_PSD2: SCA required for most electronic payments — 3D Secure satisfies this
regional_requirements.US: 3D Secure optional but recommended for fraud reduction
regional_requirements.Asia_Pacific: Requirements vary by country and card network

best_practices: Use SCA_WHEN_REQUIRED for optimal balance of security and conversion
Always check liability_shift in capture response before fulfillment
Log 3D Secure results for dispute resolution
Do not capture when authentication_status is N or R
Handle 3D Secure challenge UI gracefully (loading states, error messages)
Test with sandbox cards that trigger different 3DS scenarios
